name: Baked Cod with Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 whole cod, head, tail and fins removed
2 cups bread crumbs, up to 3 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all stuffing ingredients together well until it can be formed into a ball.
2. Stuff the interior of the cod with the savory stuffing immediately before baking.
3. Secure the stuffed cod with twine to hold in the stuffing.
4. Place the salt pork fat back on top of the cod, covering the open side.
5. Bake at 350°F for one hour or until the salt pork is brown and crunchy.
6. Enjoy, though bacon could be substituted for the salt pork if desired.
